description_long: This is a two-story brick convenience store with a flat, corrugated metal roof topped by a satellite dish. The front facade features three large windows on the upper floor and a glass double-door entrance flanked by a display window and a Coca-Cola vending machine. The ground floor has a recessed entryway with a trash bin and visible interior shelving stocked with goods. The rear and side walls are plain brick, with a small concrete utility box or planter attached to one side. The building's exterior is characterized by utilitarian concrete ledges separating the floors and a lack of decorative elements, emphasizing function over form.
description: A two-story brick convenience store with a flat metal roof, glass entrance, and a Coca-Cola vending machine at the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass entrance doors, three upper windows, a Coca-Cola vending machine, and a trash bin.
description_view_1: Rear view with plain brick wall, satellite dish on the roof, and the side of the vending machine visible.
description_view_2: Side view with unadorned brick wall and a small concrete utility box or planter attached.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the edge of the vending machine and trash bin, with no windows or doors.
attribute_storefront_signage: Coca-Cola vending machine with prominent red and white logo on the front right; no other visible signage or illuminated signs on the building facade.
attribute_glass_entrance_doors: Yes, double swinging glass doors with metal frames, high transparency, and visible handles.
attribute_display_windows: Three large rectangular display windows on the upper floor, clear glass with white frames; ground floor has a large window adjacent to the entrance displaying store interior.
